title: 4.5 Seller Communication Cadence
description: 📞 The listing agreement is a contract. The communication cadence is the relationship. Sellers who feel informed and respected stay calm, stay rational, and make better decisions. Sellers who feel ignored get anxious, second-guess everything, and blame their agent when things get hard.
